reviews.comment:
Que se puede decir del ACA.  Nafta, baños y alguna cosita fresca para tomar como descanso en la ruta.  Los sanitarios aceptables.  El parque recreativo pasable para marear un rato antes de partir.  Nada más

(Translated by Google)
What can you say about the ACA? Gas, restrooms, and a few refreshing drinks to grab while you're on the road. The restrooms are acceptable. The recreation area is passable for relaxing for a while before leaving. Nothing more.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnbThQRnBnRRAB
